examples: I love staying in my cozy bed on rainy days.
They have a cozy little apartment.
context: We've got our work cut out for us tonight. This apartment is a bit small but it's cozy. It's time to start unpacking. I hate this part. Our last apartment was fully furnished, so we didn't have any of our own furniture, but this place was completely empty. It was unfurnished, so we had to buy a few necessities like this mattress. We need somewhere to sleep tonight. Let's do some unboxing.

examples: I'm definitely coming to the party.
This is definitely the best pizza I've ever had.
You should definitely try the cheesecake.
context: My favorite spot in the new apartment is definitely the kitchen. It's the best room here.
